ValidationRule.description: If withholding tax needed is yes, Withholding Tax rate to apply is mandatory
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISPICKVAL( Withholding_Tax_Needed__c , "Yes") && ISBLANK( Withholding_Tax_Rate_To_Apply__c ) && ISPICKVAL(Request_Type__c , "Invoice request")
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please detail the rate to apply if withholding tax needed
